prestazioni: Stage 2+ ECU and TCU remap by APR targeting 650+ HP and 750+ Nm on the **CWGD** dual-motor electric powertrain (800V architecture), with custom torque vectoring calibration for rear-biased power delivery and 0-60 mph in 2.8s via launch control optimization. Includes APR’s proprietary ‘Track Mode’ with elevated regenerative braking aggression (up to 290 kW) and adaptive thermal management for sustained performance.

Full carbon ceramic brake system upgrade with **Brembo GT-RS 420mm front and 380mm rear rotors** (cross-drilled, 6-piston monobloc calipers front, 4-piston rear), paired with **Pagid RS29** racing pads and **Motul RBF 660** brake fluid for fade resistance under 200°C+ track conditions. Includes **AP Racing CP8390-350** brake master cylinder for pedal feel refinement.

Custom **Unplugged Performance** high-voltage battery thermal management system with dual **Setrab 50-row oil coolers** (front bumper integration) and **Mocal 13-row heat exchangers** for the rear motor, ensuring consistent power output during 10+ lap endurance sessions. Includes **AEM EV VCU-300** voltage control unit for dynamic power limiting based on battery SoC and temperature.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit for RS e-tron GT (carbon fiber, 50mm front and 70mm rear fender flares) with **custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser extensions** for improved airflow separation. Includes **Vorsteiner V-FF107** forged carbon fiber front splitter with integrated **Audi Sport** laser-cut aluminum canards.

**Rocket Bunny V3** rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,800mm span, 300mm chord) with **Aeroflow Dynamics** active Gurney flap (electrically adjustable via CAN bus) and **MagneRide 4.0** suspension-linked ride height compensation to maintain optimal angle of attack at speeds above 120 mph.

**HRE FF03** forged monoblock wheels (21x10.5 ET35 front, 21x12.5 ET45 rear) in **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear). Includes **HRE’s proprietary FlowForm+** barrel design for reduced rotational mass (18.5 lbs front, 22.3 lbs rear) and **BBS CH-R** center-lock adapters for track-day wheel swaps.
